title: Vanilla Handcuffs!
description: Ever wanted to troll your AFK friend or trap other players? This is your mod!
body:
# **Vanilla Handcuffs!**
A simple mod that adds handcuffs to the game, craft them using 2 iron ingots and 4 iron nuggets.

![Handcuffs Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08a9bb41594ffad1d2cd3f1e70e9dffe0165ccd9.png)

Sneak behind a player and use the handcuffs to trap them. After a few seconds it will lose their inventory and be attached to the ground.

![Capture a Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a631f2b83476e49306127c882bc8551339e578b.png)

That's it! You get a **unique key** to relase the player! Don't lose it!

![Player Cooked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19bc71e9c8232110156c76f267fbaac70e8c972e.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_Villagers can also be chained_

</details>
